steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states "Most solar eclipses from long ago have been forgotten, but not all." The next sentence must introduce a specific eclipse as evidence of the exception. The transition word must signal a concrete example.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Next,": signals a chronological sequence, not an illustrative example. ✗
  • "Regardless,": signals dismissal of a prior point — the opposite of building on it. ✗
  • "For example,": directly introduces a specific instance that proves the "but not all" claim. ✓
  • "In summary,": signals a conclusion, not an example. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
